en: No, I don't. Good enough for me.
ko: 아니, 나는 안 그래. 나한테는 충분해.

en: Where are you going? A mother is no best. Get yourself a sucker on the way out.
Look, I think he's just faking so he doesn't have to go to school.
ko: 봐, 그는 학교에 가기 싫어서 그냥 뻥치는 것 같아.

en: How did you know I was a truant officer? I told him he had a choice.
ko: 내가 어떻게 네가 무단결석 단속관인지 알았지?

en: Go to school or the doctor. Right. He's wasting your breath.
ko: 맞아. 그는 너의 소중한 시간을 낭비하고, 너는 내 시간을 낭비하기로 결정했네.

en: so you decided to waste mine. How thoughtful.
I'm in a wheelchair, so I can't examine him all the way up there. Hop down.
ko: 나는 휠체어에 있어서 저기까지 검사할 수 없어.

en: My life is just one horror after another. Open.
Does it look like it hurts? Nope.
I'm with you. You make him hate the doctor's office more than he hates school.
ko: 너는 그를 학교보다 의사 사무실을 더 싫어하게 만들어.

en: That's okay. I don't think that... It's just saline.
It hurts like hell when it's injected directly into the muscle. So what do you think?
ko: 그냥 식염수야. 근육에 직접 주사하면 정말 아파.

en: Arm or ass? I think he's learned his lesson. Oh, I don't know.
